'''Targonnians''' were a [[Color/Legends|green]] flightless [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Targonn/Legends|Targonn]].

During the waning years of the Galactic Republic, the Targonnians were ruled by [[Craw]] the self-styled [[Dictator-Forever]] of Targonn.
Craw was extremely self-absorbed and cared little for the troubles of his people, creating a 99 percent tax, and forcing child labor. The chief enforcer of his will was Captain [[Steggus]]. Craw sought the secret of [[Savorium herb|savorium]] which he planned to utilize to stop the peasants under his rule from complaining about the poor conditions in which they lived.

Around [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], the [[Revoltist]] faction led by [[Shay]] were dedicated to overthrow of Dictator-Forever Craw's rule.
